target.label: Epic 5: UX Mockup Fidelity — Close Visual Drift

concerns.description: no-scrollbar class was missing from full-width artifact list pane (artifacts/page.tsx:124). FIXED in 2026-07-13 bug-hunt: class added + test added at artifacts/page.test.tsx:265-269. Was the primary driver of the prior 2026-07-12 CONCERNS decision.

AC-1 inline-position tests use textContent.contains() — verifies string presence but not RELATIVE ORDER. AC contract is 'at the EXACT POSITION the tool call occurred'. A future regression randomizing segment order would not be caught. Backend test agent.service.unit.spec.ts:1374-1380 DOES verify order via segmentTypes.indexOf('tool_call') with adjacent text segments — frontend should mirror this approach.
concerns.remediation: Replace toContain(...) with DOTALL regex toMatch(/Before.*Bash.*After/s) or compareDocumentPosition DOM walking in ConversationPane.test.tsx (4 tests) and AgentMessage.test.tsx (1 test)

concerns.description: TOOL_CALL_END handler (ConversationPane.tsx:389-413) unconditionally overwrites tool_call segment status to 'completed' — could mask an already-set 'error' state if TOOL_CALL_RESULT arrives out-of-order. Currently unreachable via AG-UI protocol (content_block_stop precedes tool_result), but real — defense-in-depth missing.
concerns.remediation: Add guard: status: s.toolCall.status === 'error' ? 'error' : 'completed' as const

concerns.description: AgentServiceFake (agent-service.fake.ts:186-203) awaits working tree check inline, while production agent.service.ts:638-660 fires it as fire-and-forget promise pushed to pendingClassifierPromises. Test-seam divergence — fake is more deterministic than production. Timing-dependent bugs would pass in fake-based tests but fail in production.
concerns.remediation: Mirror pendingClassifierPromises pattern in fake's runTurn loop

concerns.description: Branded placeholder 'Message bmad-easy...' not wired up by parent component. Implementation sets default to 'Message...' (tested), but branded variant is never passed. Implementation gap, not test gap. Deferred per DP-5.
concerns.remediation: Wire placeholder prop on ChatInput in new-conversation context

concerns.description: Tests cover only zero-conversation case for top-clustered nav links. jsdom cannot test scroll behavior with conversations filling the viewport.
concerns.remediation: Add E2E layout test with conversations if needed

concerns.description: NFR-5.4 PASS WITH CONCERNS: 1 remaining Medium finding (missing select projection on repoConnection.findUnique — pre-existing, not introduced by Epic 5). The AC-7 full-width pane gap finding is now FIXED.
concerns.remediation: Add select projection to repoConnection.findUnique call

concerns.description: AgentServiceFake segments persistence test (agent.service.spec.ts:184-202) asserts only shape (toHaveProperty('segments') + Array.isArray), not contents. A regression persisting empty segments: [] would still pass.
concerns.remediation: Extend test to assert segment contents match script events

concerns.description: agent.service.unit.spec.ts:1413 uses shallow toHaveProperty('status') instead of toBe('completed'). A regression to 'running' or undefined would still pass.

TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT handler (ConversationPane.tsx:280-304) silently drops delta when streamingMessageIdRef.current is null (if messageId guard fails). Unreachable in normal AG-UI flow. Defense-in-depth missing.
concerns.remediation: Optional: log console.warn when guard fails, or create empty streaming message on delta-without-START

concerns.description: Resume path (conversations/[conversationId]/page.tsx:44) casts DB JSON to MessageSegment[] without runtime validation. Per Story 5.5 DP-3 decision, no runtime validation needed for MVP. Defense-in-depth missing — malformed persisted data would crash AgentMessage.tsx:131.
concerns.remediation: Add Array.isArray guard: segments: Array.isArray(turn.segments) ? (turn.segments as MessageSegment[]) : undefined

concerns.description: AgentMessage.tsx:99 uses index-based React keys (key={`text-${index}`}) for text segments. Anti-pattern — unstable when array is reordered or inserted at non-end positions. Currently inert (segments are append-only).
concerns.remediation: Use stable id (crypto.randomUUID()) or composite key derived from content

concerns.description: MANUAL_SAVE_SUCCEEDED and MANUAL_SAVE_FAILED handlers (ConversationPane.tsx:543-693) contain ~150 lines of duplicated structure. Only differences: status, semantic, errorMessage. Code-quality concern — divergence risk on future edits.
concerns.remediation: Extract buildManualSaveSegment(toolCallId, status, semantic?, errorMessage?) helper

concerns.description: no-scrollbar panels (SideNavigation, ChatMessageList, artifacts/page) lack keyboard scrollability — no tabIndex={0} or role=region with aria-label. Pre-existing accessibility gap.
concerns.remediation: Add tabIndex={0}, role=region, aria-label to scrollable panels

concerns.description: SlashCommandPicker header uses role=presentation — may benefit from role=heading. Pre-existing ARIA concern.
concerns.remediation: Evaluate appropriate ARIA role for the picker header

recommendations.action: Fix M-new-1 (AC-1 false-green tests) — replace textContent.contains with DOTALL regex or compareDocumentPosition in ConversationPane.test.tsx (4 tests) and AgentMessage.test.tsx (1 test)
Commit the bug-hunt fixes (uncommitted in working tree): no-scrollbar class + test, ChatMessageList auto-scroll deps + aria-live assertion, RepositoryUrlForm maxLength test
Fix M-new-2 (TOOL_CALL_END status overwrite) — add guard to preserve 'error' state if already set
Fix M-new-3 (AgentServiceFake divergence) — mirror pendingClassifierPromises pattern in fake's runTurn loop
Run E2E test suite against running dev server + database + sandbox infrastructure to verify all 4 E2E files (including story-5-5-inline-pills with 7 active tests) pass
Wire up branded placeholder 'Message bmad-easy...' on ChatInput in new-conversation context (AC-5, Story 5.3)
Address pre-existing NFR finding: add select projection to repoConnection.findUnique
Add keyboard scrollability to no-scrollbar panels (tabIndex=0, role=region, aria-label)

Address Story 5.5 bug-hunt Low findings (L1 shallow spec test, L2 shallow status assertion, L3 silent drop, L4 unvalidated JSON cast, L5 index-based React keys, L6 manual-save handler duplication) as backlog items
